creator: sd@beastie.io
text:
mat@ asked me to file a PR to change my phabricator profile email

current: shawn@debnath.net
desired: sd@beastie.io

09:27 <sd> got a favor to ask. My current phabricator username is shawn@debnath.net. Is it possible to change the username to a different email? I have validated the email but it doesn't change the profile apparently.
11:29 <mat_> it is, open a bug report and assign it to phabric-admin@

Thanks!
